ideation: This sequence mimics the direction of the arrow using both arms. The left arm points directly downward while the right arm points to the right, creating a combined downward-left diagonal gesture.  The sequence will start with the arms at rest, transition to a pointing pose, and then return to rest, creating a clear indication of the arrow's direction. Frame 1 will start with both arms at rest. Frame 2 will show the right arm pointing to the right and the left arm pointing downward. Frame 3 will return to the arms at rest.

frames.beat: both arms hang down, ready to indicate
left arm points down, right arm points right
arms return to rest, gesture complete
